process.title: From first call to live agent in 8 weeks
process.subtitle: A disciplined four-step method with no ambiguity about what happens next.

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: We map your data landscape, interview stakeholders, and identify the one or two workflows where AI will create the most measurable impact. No assumptions.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: We architect the agent: data model, decision logic, integrations, and success metrics — all signed off before a single line of code is written.

steps.title: Deploy
steps.description: We build, test, and ship to your infrastructure. Typical timeline: 8 weeks from kickoff to production. Your team reviews at every milestone.

steps.title: Optimise
steps.description: We monitor, retrain, and improve the agent on real usage data — continuously. This is not a one-off project. It is a long-term capability.

how_we_work.page_subtitle: A fixed 4-step engagement model with no ambiguity — so you know exactly what you are buying before you sign.
how_we_work.intro: Most AI projects fail not because the technology is wrong, but because the process is undefined. We fix that with a repeatable, transparent delivery method used across every engagement — from a 4-week AI strategy sprint to an 8-week full agent deployment.

phases.title: Discover
phases.description: We start with your data, your workflows, and your real bottlenecks — not a generic AI framework. This phase produces a written discovery report with the 3 highest-value AI opportunities in your business, ranked by expected ROI and implementation risk.
deliverables: Data landscape and source system audit
AI readiness score with gap analysis
Top 3 opportunity brief with ROI estimates

phases.title: Design
phases.description: We design the agent architecture before writing a line of code. Data model, decision logic, integration points, and success metrics are all documented and agreed. You sign off on exactly what will be built — and exactly how we will measure whether it worked.
deliverables: Integration design with your existing systems

phases.title: Deploy
phases.description: We build, test, and ship to your infrastructure. You review working software at each milestone — not slide decks. By week 8 you have a production agent running on your infrastructure, owned by your team.
deliverables: Production-ready AI agent on your infrastructure
Integration with your ERP, CRM, or data platform

phases.title: Optimise
phases.description: An AI agent improves with use. We monitor performance, retrain models on new data, and expand scope based on what we learn in production. The first 90 days of optimisation are included in every engagement.
deliverables: Model retraining on new production data

how_we_work.pricing_note: Every engagement is scoped and priced for your specific situation. These are starting frameworks — not fixed packages.

packages.name: AI Strategy Sprint
packages.description: For organisations that want a clear AI roadmap before committing to build. Includes discovery, prioritisation, architecture options, and a board-ready presentation.
packages.typical_for: CIOs and CDOs who need executive alignment before investing in AI

packages.name: Agent Deployment
packages.description: A single, high-impact AI agent designed, built, and shipped to your production environment. Includes 90 days of optimisation after go-live.
packages.typical_for: Operations, finance, and CX leaders with a specific workflow to automate

packages.name: Managed AI Retainer
packages.description: OTMA as your embedded AI team — continuously building, monitoring, and improving agents across your organisation. Monthly scope, weekly cadence.
packages.typical_for: Enterprises that want AI capability without hiring a full data science team

faqs.q: Do we need to replace our existing systems?
faqs.a: No. OTMA agents are designed to integrate with your existing ERP, CRM, and data infrastructure. We connect to what you already have — we do not rip and replace.

faqs.q: What data do you need access to?
faqs.a: Typically: your transactional system (Dynamics 365, SAP, or similar), historical records for model training, and your reporting layer. We do a full data audit in week 1 so there are no surprises.

faqs.q: Who owns the agent after it is built?
faqs.a: You do. All code, models, and infrastructure run on your cloud account. We hand over full documentation and train your team to operate it independently.

faqs.q: What if we are not ready for AI yet?
faqs.a: That is exactly what the AI Strategy Sprint is for. We assess your readiness honestly — and if your data is not ready, we tell you what needs to happen first and in what order.

faqs.q: How is OTMA different from a large consulting firm?
faqs.a: We ship production code in 8 weeks. Large consultancies produce roadmaps that take 18 months to execute. We are the team you bring in when the roadmap is approved and the outcome needs to be delivered.

how_we_work.cta_subtitle: Tell us your biggest data bottleneck. We will tell you honestly whether an AI agent can solve it — and what it would take.

about.page_subtitle: Founded in Riyadh in 2022. Built to close the gap between AI ambition and AI outcomes in enterprise.
about.mission: Enterprise AI projects fail at an alarming rate — not because the technology is wrong, but because the delivery is. OTMA was founded to fix that: bringing engineered, accountable AI agents to global businesses that need outcomes, not theatre.
about.vision: To become the most trusted partner for enterprise AI in the GCC and emerging markets — the firm that CIOs call when the roadmap is approved and the outcome needs to be delivered.
about.story: After 15 years working inside enterprise data and CRM environments — leading digital transformation at scale across Saudi industry — Khaled Ali kept seeing the same pattern: large AI budgets, expensive consultants, and very little running in production. The gap between what AI could do and what enterprises were actually getting was not a technology problem. It was a delivery problem. OTMA was founded in 2022 to close that gap.
about.founder_bio: Khaled has spent over 15 years leading data, CRM, and digital transformation engagements across Saudi Arabia's largest industrial and financial enterprises. He holds deep expertise in Microsoft Dynamics 365, Azure AI, and enterprise data architecture — and has personally overseen more than 30 technology programmes from inception to production. He founded OTMA because he believes enterprise AI should be measured in outcomes, not in slide decks.

values.title: Outcomes, not theatre
values.description: We measure success in production deployments and measurable business results — not impressive demos or lengthy strategy documents.

values.title: Honest before optimistic
values.description: We tell you what AI can and cannot do for your situation. If your data is not ready, we say so. That honesty is what makes our outcomes trustworthy.

values.title: Arabic and English equally
values.description: Bilingual AI is a design requirement in every system we build — not a localisation patch. Your Arabic-speaking customers and employees get the same experience.

values.title: You own everything
values.description: All code, models, and infrastructure run on your cloud account. We train your team to operate it. You are never dependent on us to keep the lights on.

about.where_reach: We deliver globally and have active clients across KSA, the wider GCC, the UK, and North America.

timeline.event: OTMA founded in Riyadh. First enterprise AI agent deployed for a Saudi manufacturing group.
Expanded to banking sector. CRM intelligence platform deployed across two regional banks.
Launched bilingual Arabic–English conversational AI practice. GCC client base grows to 10+ enterprises.
Data engineering and cloud architecture practices formalised. Microsoft Solution Partner status achieved.

about.cta_text: We take on a limited number of new engagements each quarter to maintain quality. If you are evaluating AI investment for 2025, let us start the conversation now.

case_studies.page_subtitle: Six deployments. Real outcomes. Every metric measured against a pre-agreed baseline.

items.title: AI agent for supplier evaluation — Saudi industrial group
items.summary: A large manufacturing conglomerate was spending 3 weeks per procurement cycle manually evaluating 200+ suppliers against 30 criteria. OTMA deployed an AI agent that processes RFQs, scores suppliers automatically, and surfaces recommendations directly inside Dynamics 365. The 3-week process now takes 2 days.
items.before: 3-week manual supplier evaluation process across 200+ vendors
items.after: 2-day automated process with AI scoring and D365 recommendations

items.title: CRM intelligence for credit risk — regional bank
items.summary: A regional bank's loan approval process averaged 6 days — a competitive disadvantage in a market where applicants apply to multiple institutions simultaneously. OTMA embedded a credit risk scoring model into their Dynamics 365 deployment, trained on 18 months of historical decisioning data. Average approval time dropped from 6 days to under 2.
items.before: 6-day average loan approval process, manual risk assessment
items.after: Under 2 days with real-time AI scoring embedded in D365

items.result: 78% of queries resolved without human escalation
items.title: Bilingual conversational AI — multi-brand retail group
items.summary: A multi-brand retail group was handling 4,000+ monthly customer queries across Arabic and English with a team of 18 agents. Their legacy chatbot resolved less than 20% automatically. OTMA replaced it with a bilingual AI assistant integrated with their CRM and product catalogue. Within 60 days, 78% of queries resolved without human involvement and the team refocused on high-value interactions.
items.before: Legacy chatbot resolving <20% of queries. 18-agent support team at capacity.
items.after: 78% automated resolution. Team handling complex and revenue-generating interactions.

items.title: Power BI AI dashboards — GCC logistics operator
items.summary: A regional logistics operator had 14 Power BI reports that required manual data prep every morning — taking 3 analysts 4 hours each day. OTMA rebuilt the data model with automated pipelines and embedded AI-powered anomaly detection. Executives now receive a daily automated summary before 7am. The 4-hour manual process was eliminated entirely.
items.before: 4 hours of daily manual data preparation across 3 analysts
items.after: Zero manual prep. Automated summaries delivered by 7am every day.

items.result: Patient referral processing time cut from 5 days to 4 hours
items.title: Document intelligence agent — private hospital network
items.summary: A private hospital network was processing referral documents manually — a 5-day cycle involving data entry, verification, and routing across three systems. OTMA built a document intelligence agent that extracts, validates, and routes referral data automatically, triggering the correct workflow in their ERP. The 5-day cycle became 4 hours.
items.before: 5-day manual referral cycle across three disconnected systems
items.after: 4-hour automated processing with zero manual data entry

items.result: Data governance framework covering 2.4M records in 5 weeks
items.title: Enterprise data governance — public sector authority
items.summary: A government authority needed to implement a data governance framework across 2.4 million citizen records ahead of a regulatory deadline. OTMA designed and implemented a Microsoft Purview-based catalogue with full lineage, access controls, and automated quality monitoring — delivered 3 weeks ahead of the regulatory deadline.
items.before: 2.4M records with no governance, lineage, or access controls
items.after: Full Purview catalogue, PDPL-compliant access policies, automated quality monitoring
items.timeline: Delivered in 5 weeks — 3 weeks ahead of regulatory deadline
